title: well_assess_homeostasis (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `well_assess_homeostasis`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing well schema for `well_assess_homeostasis` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Homeostasis numbers are read as social signals, not just internal telemetry.

homeostasis_symbolic_layer.description: §14 MEDIUM — Homeostasis can be misread as cold optimisation. Add the symbolic layer.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every well_assess_homeostasis output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
